name: Tracing Games
description: Tracing Game is a fun and educational learning game designed for toddlers, preschoolers, and kindergarten kids. Children can practice tracing uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, shapes, and simple lines using colorful guides and interactive animations. The game helps improve handwriting, fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and early learning in an enjoyable way. you can play more at crazycubix.com
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
